---
title: "Constantinos Tziouvas"
subtitle: "Assistant Professor"
description: "Assistant Professor, Department of Communication and Internet Studies, Cyprus University of Technology. Research interests: Big Data, Argument Mining, Social Media Analysis."
image: images_team/costas.png
categories: [Coordinators]
---

Assistant Professor at the Department of Communication and Internet Studies, Cyprus University of Technology (CUT). Ph.D. in Computer Networks from the City University of New York. Has participated in numerous EU-funded research projects and published in various journals related to Computer Science and Social and Political Science.

**Research interests:** Big Data, Argument Mining, Social Media Analysis.

**Email:** costas.tziouvas@cut.ac.cy
